description: Returns a list of Near Misses for a given project.

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: Incident ID. When provided, the list will be scoped to only the Near Misses for a given Incident.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[affected_company_id]
parameters.description: Array of Company IDs. Returns item(s) with the specified affected Company IDs.

parameters.name: filters[affected_party_id]
parameters.description: Array of Affected Party IDs. Returns item(s) with the specified Affected Party IDs.

parameters.name: filters[affected_person_id]
parameters.description: Array of Person IDs. Returns item(s) with the specified affected Person IDs.

parameters.name: filters[harm_source_id]
parameters.description: Array of Harm Source IDs. Returns item(s) with the specified Harm Source IDs.

parameters.name: filters[work_activity_id]
parameters.description: Array of Work Activity IDs. Returns item(s) with the specified Work Activity IDs.

parameters.name: filters[managed_equipment_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Managed Equipment ID.
